summary: clean-my-pc exfiltrates host information to hardcoded external endpoint
details: The package's collect.js file imports child_process, fs, os, http, and https, reads host identifiers (os.hostname(), os.homedir()) and inspects filesystem paths via fs.existsSync, then POSTs the collected data to the hardcoded endpoint http://aab.sportsontheweb.net. The destination is an unrelated third-party domain that does not match any legitimate publisher infrastructure for a 'PC cleaner' utility, and the combination of host-identifier collection plus filesystem enumeration plus outbound POST to a hardcoded attacker-controlled host matches the classic supply-chain exfiltration fingerprint. Installing or loading this package causes the installer's host information to be sent to that endpoint over cleartext HTTP.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
